emptyState.title: Create an API key to access the OpenAI API

dialog.title: Create new secret key
dialog.description: This API key is tied to your user and can make requests against the selected project. If you are removed from the organiation or project, this key will be disabled.

requiredDialog.title: API Key Required
requiredDialog.description: You need an API key to use this feature.

noKeyState.title: No API keys
noKeyState.description: Please create an API key to access this feature.

saveDialog.title: Save your key
saveDialog.description: Please save this secret key somewhere safe and accessible. For security reasons, you won't be able to view it again through your Venera account. If you lose this secret key, you'll need to generate a new one.
saveDialog.keySet: This key has been automatically set for AI services

description.permissions: You have permission to view and manage all API keys in this project.
description.security: Do not share your API key with others or expose it in the browser or other client-side code. To protect your account's security, OpenAI may automatically disable any API key that has leaked publicly.
description.usage: View usage per API key on the Usage page.
